functions.name: circularChromaHue
functions.signature: static inline uint8_t circularChromaHue(const float chroma[12])

parameters.name: chroma
parameters.description: Array of 12 chroma magnitudes (one per semitone, C through B)

functions.formula: hue = atan2(sum(chroma[i]*kSin[i]), sum(chroma[i]*kCos[i])) * (255 / 2pi). Circular weighted mean of 12 chroma bins mapped to 0-255 palette hue.
functions.notes: Instantaneous variant. Prefer circularChromaHueSmoothed() for frame-to-frame stability. Replaces broken argmax pattern that caused jarring hue jumps.

functions.name: circularEma
functions.signature: static inline float circularEma(float newAngle, float prevAngle, float alpha)

parameters.name: prevAngle
parameters.description: Previous smoothed angle (state, modified in place)

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.description: EMA alpha (0 = no change, 1 = instant snap)

functions.formula: diff = newAngle - prevAngle; wrap diff to [-pi, pi]; result = prevAngle + diff * alpha; wrap result to [0, 2pi)
functions.notes: Shortest-arc interpolation. Always takes the minimal path around the circle. Used internally by circularChromaHueSmoothed. Alpha must be pre-computed with dt-correction for frame-rate independence.

functions.name: circularChromaHueSmoothed
functions.signature: static inline uint8_t circularChromaHueSmoothed(const float chroma[12], float& prevAngle, float dt, float tau = 0.20f)

parameters.name: prevAngle
parameters.description: Previous smoothed angle in radians (caller must persist, initialise to 0.0f)

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Delta time in seconds (use rawDt for frame-rate independence)

parameters.name: tau
parameters.description: Time constant in seconds. 0.12=responsive, 0.25=smooth, 0.40=very stable. Default 0.20

functions.formula: angle = atan2(sum(chroma[i]*kSin[i]), sum(chroma[i]*kCos[i])); alpha = 1 - exp(-dt/tau); prevAngle = circularEma(angle, prevAngle, alpha); return prevAngle * (255/2pi)
functions.notes: PRIMARY chroma function for effects. 22 effects use this. Replaces broken dominantChromaBin12() argmax. Frame-rate independent via dt-corrected EMA alpha.

functions.name: dtDecay
functions.signature: static inline float dtDecay(float value, float rate60fps, float dt)
functions.notes: Replaces bare 'value *= rate' pattern. The rate parameter is specified at 60fps reference and auto-scales to actual dt via powf.

functions.name: clamp01
functions.signature: static inline float clamp01(float v)
functions.notes: Used pervasively across BeatPulse family, transport cores, and film post. Multiple local redefinitions exist in KuramotoTransportBuffer and LGPFilmPost.

functions.name: lerp
functions.signature: static inline float lerp(float a, float b, float t)
functions.notes: Standard lerp. Not clamped -- caller must ensure t is in [0,1].

functions.name: floatToByte
functions.signature: static inline uint8_t floatToByte(float v)
functions.domain: Unit float to byte conversion with rounding
functions.notes: Used in all BeatPulse family effects for palette indexing and brightness conversion.

functions.name: scaleBrightness
functions.signature: static inline uint8_t scaleBrightness(uint8_t baseBrightness, float factor)
functions.notes: Used in BeatPulse family for final brightness output.

functions.name: RingProfile::gaussian
functions.signature: static inline float gaussian(float distance, float sigma)
functions.domain: Gaussian ring profile for soft natural falloff
functions.notes: At distance=sigma intensity is ~0.6, at 2*sigma ~0.13, at 3*sigma ~0.01.

functions.name: RingProfile::tent
functions.signature: static inline float tent(float distance, float width)
functions.notes: Cheapest ring profile. Linear falloff.

functions.name: RingProfile::cosine
functions.signature: static inline float cosine(float distance, float width)
functions.domain: Cosine ring profile (zero derivative at edges)
functions.notes: Smooth falloff with zero derivative at edges. Good for seamless layering.

functions.name: RingProfile::glow
functions.signature: static inline float glow(float distance, float coreWidth, float haloWidth)

parameters.name: haloWidth
parameters.description: Width of soft halo beyond core

functions.domain: Bright core + soft halo for water-like spread
functions.notes: Two-zone profile: 1.0 at centre, 0.8 at core edge, quadratic decay in halo to 0.

functions.name: RingProfile::hardEdge
functions.signature: static inline float hardEdge(float diff, float width, float softness)
functions.formula: 1 if diff <= width-softness; 0 if diff >= width+softness; linear in transition zone
functions.notes: Sharp pressure wave front with subtle anti-aliasing at edges.

functions.name: ColourUtil::addWhiteSaturating
functions.signature: static inline void addWhiteSaturating(CRGB& c, uint8_t w)
functions.formula: lum = (r+g+b)/3; lumNew = min(255, lum+w); scale each channel by lumNew/lum. Hue-preserving luminance boost.
functions.notes: Hue-preserving. Scales luminance so r:g:b ratio is maintained. Replaces original addWhiteSaturating which drove toward (255,255,255).

functions.name: ColourUtil::additive
functions.signature: static inline CRGB additive(const CRGB& base, const CRGB& overlay)
functions.notes: Averages R, G, B so both layers are visible without washing out palette. Replaces former additive which summed channels driving output to white.

functions.name: BlendMode::softAccumulate
functions.signature: static inline float softAccumulate(float accumulated, float knee = 1.5f)

parameters.name: knee
parameters.description: Softness of curve (higher = softer saturation). Default 1.5

functions.notes: Maps [0, inf) to [0, 1) with configurable knee. Multiple overlapping rings accumulate without harsh clipping.

functions.name: BlendMode::screen
functions.signature: static inline float screen(float a, float b)
functions.notes: Graceful additive that avoids clipping. Multiple layers blend without harsh saturation.

functions.name: BeatPulseHTML::decayMul
functions.signature: static inline float decayMul(float dtSeconds)
functions.domain: dt-correct beat decay multiplier matching HTML demo at 60fps
functions.notes: Equivalent to repeatedly multiplying by 0.94 once per 1/60s frame. Uses powf internally.

functions.name: BeatPulseHTML::updateBeatIntensity
functions.signature: static inline void updateBeatIntensity(float& beatIntensity, bool beatTick, float dtSeconds)

parameters.name: beatIntensity
parameters.description: Current intensity state [0..1], modified in place

functions.formula: if(beatTick) beatIntensity=1; beatIntensity *= pow(0.94, dt*60); if < 0.0005 then 0
functions.domain: Beat envelope update with HTML-parity behaviour
functions.notes: Used by BeatPulseCore::stepEnvelope. Locks exact maths from HTML Beat Pulse demo.

functions.name: BeatPulseHTML::ringCentre01
functions.signature: static inline float ringCentre01(float beatIntensity)
functions.domain: Ring centre position in normalised distance units
functions.notes: Maps beatIntensity to radial ring position. At 1.0 (beat hit), ring is at 0.6 (60% from centre).

functions.name: BeatPulseHTML::intensityAtDist
functions.signature: static inline float intensityAtDist(float dist01, float beatIntensity)
functions.formula: waveHit = 1 - min(1, |dist01 - ringCentre01(beatIntensity)| * 3); intensity = max(0, waveHit) * beatIntensity
functions.domain: Per-LED pulse intensity from HTML formula
functions.notes: Exact port of HTML Beat Pulse demo maths.

functions.name: BeatPulseHTML::brightnessFactor
functions.signature: static inline float brightnessFactor(float intensity)
functions.notes: Returns [0.5..1.0]. Ensures minimum 50% brightness even at zero intensity.

functions.name: BeatPulseHTML::whiteMix
functions.signature: static inline float whiteMix(float intensity)
functions.domain: White mix fraction for beat pulse (HTML parity)
functions.notes: Returns [0..0.3]. Controls how much white is mixed into beat pulse centre.

functions.name: BeatPulseTiming::computeBeatTick
functions.signature: static inline bool computeBeatTick(const plugins::EffectContext& ctx, float fallbackBpm, uint32_t& lastBeatMs)

parameters.name: fallbackBpm
parameters.description: Fallback BPM when no audio lock

parameters.name: lastBeatMs
parameters.description: Persisted last beat timestamp (modified in place)

functions.formula: If tempo confidence >= 0.25 and audio available, use audio beat tick. Otherwise, use raw-time fallback: trigger when elapsed >= 60000/fallbackBpm.
functions.domain: Beat tick with confidence gate and fallback metronome
functions.notes: Via AudioReactivePolicy::audioBeatTick -> BeatPulseCore::stepEnvelope. Confidence threshold kTempoConfMin = 0.25.

functions.name: AudioReactivePolicy::signalDt
functions.signature: static inline float signalDt(const plugins::EffectContext& ctx)
functions.formula: ctx.getSafeRawDeltaSeconds() -- raw (unscaled by SPEED) delta time clamped to [0.0001, 0.05]
functions.notes: SPEED slider must NOT distort DSP-coupled maths. All audio-reactive effects must use this for signal processing dt.

functions.name: AudioReactivePolicy::visualDt
functions.signature: static inline float visualDt(const plugins::EffectContext& ctx)
functions.formula: ctx.getSafeDeltaSeconds() -- SPEED-scaled delta time clamped to [0.0001, 0.05]
functions.notes: Use for visual-only motion (pattern speed, palette cycling). NOT for audio-coupled maths.

functions.name: BeatPulseCore::stepEnvelope
functions.signature: static inline bool stepEnvelope(const plugins::EffectContext& ctx, State& s)
functions.formula: beatTick = AudioReactivePolicy::audioBeatTick(ctx, ...); dt = signalDt(ctx); BeatPulseHTML::updateBeatIntensity(s.beatIntensity, beatTick, dt);
functions.domain: Canonical beat envelope step for BeatPulse family
functions.notes: Combines beat tick detection with HTML-parity envelope decay. Used by BeatPulseCore::renderSingleRing.

functions.name: BeatPulseCore::intensityAt
functions.signature: static inline float intensityAt(float dist01, float ringPos01, const State& s, float slope)
functions.formula: waveHit = 1 - min(1, |dist01 - ringPos01| * slope); return max(0, waveHit) * s.beatIntensity
functions.notes: Generalised version of BeatPulseHTML::intensityAtDist with configurable slope parameter.

functions.name: acesFilm
functions.signature: static inline float acesFilm(float x)
functions.formula: x *= 0.85; y = (x*(2.51x+0.03)) / (x*(2.43x+0.59)+0.14); clamp01(y). Narkowicz ACES fitted curve.
functions.notes: Narkowicz ACES fitted curve for highlight rolloff. Applied per-channel after spatial softening in film post chain.

functions.name: cinema::apply
functions.signature: void apply(plugins::EffectContext& ctx, float speedNorm)
functions.formula: Pipeline: 3-tap spatial soften -> ACES tone map -> gamma LUT -> +/-1 temporal dither -> temporal EMA. Alpha8 = 40 + 120*speedNorm.
functions.notes: Full post chain. Operates on strip A only, copies to strip B. Uses static buffers (no heap alloc). Per-LED cost: ~4 MACs (soften) + 3 ACES + 3 gamma LUT + 3 EMA = ~13 ops/LED.

functions.name: computeEmaAlpha
functions.signature: inline float computeEmaAlpha(float tau_seconds, float hop_rate_hz)

parameters.name: tau_seconds
parameters.description: Time constant in seconds (63% settling time)

functions.domain: EMA alpha from time constant and frame rate
functions.notes: Converts between time constants (seconds) and per-frame EMA alphas. Enables single set of perceptual tuning values to work across any hop rate.

functions.name: tauFromAlpha
functions.signature: inline float tauFromAlpha(float alpha, float hop_rate_hz)
functions.domain: Reverse-engineer time constant from alpha and frame rate
functions.notes: Diagnostic utility. Uses logf internally. Useful for documenting what time constant a hardcoded alpha corresponds to.

functions.name: alphaFromHalfLife
functions.signature: inline float alphaFromHalfLife(float half_life_frames)

parameters.name: half_life_frames
parameters.description: Number of frames for signal to decay to 50%

functions.domain: EMA alpha from half-life in frames
functions.notes: Frame-count-based variant. Not frame-rate independent by itself; use computeEmaAlpha for frame-rate independence.

functions.name: retunedAlpha
functions.signature: inline float retunedAlpha(float alpha_at_ref, float ref_hz, float target_hz)

parameters.name: ref_hz
parameters.description: Frame rate the original alpha was tuned for

functions.formula: tau = tauFromAlpha(alpha_at_ref, ref_hz); return computeEmaAlpha(tau, target_hz)
functions.domain: Re-scale alpha across frame rates preserving perceptual time constant
functions.notes: Preserves perceptual time constant when porting alphas between different hop rates.

functions.name: ExpDecay::update
functions.signature: float update(float target, float dt)
functions.formula: alpha = 1 - exp(-lambda * dt); value += (target - value) * alpha
functions.notes: Foundation smoothing primitive. lambda = 1/tau. Higher lambda = faster response. Produces identical results at any frame rate.

functions.name: Spring::update
functions.signature: float update(float target, float dt)
functions.formula: acceleration = (-stiffness * (position - target) - damping * velocity) / mass; velocity += acceleration * dt; position += velocity * dt
functions.notes: Critical damping: damping = 2*sqrt(stiffness*mass). Fastest approach without overshoot. Semi-implicit Euler integration.

functions.name: AsymmetricFollower::update
functions.signature: float update(float target, float dt)
functions.formula: tau = (target > value) ? riseTau : fallTau; alpha = 1 - exp(-dt/tau); value += (target - value) * alpha
functions.notes: Sensory Bridge MOOD knob pattern. Different time constants for rising vs falling. Essential for audio viz where attacks should be fast but decays smooth. 12 effects use this.

functions.name: AsymmetricFollower::updateWithMood
functions.signature: float updateWithMood(float target, float dt, float moodNorm)
functions.formula: adjRiseTau = riseTau * (1+moodNorm); adjFallTau = fallTau * (0.5 + 0.5*moodNorm); tau = (target>value) ? adjRiseTau : adjFallTau; alpha = 1-exp(-dt/tau)
functions.notes: Mood=0 (reactive): riseTau*1.0, fallTau*0.5. Mood=1 (smooth): riseTau*2.0, fallTau*1.0.

functions.name: SubpixelRenderer::renderPoint
functions.signature: static void renderPoint(CRGB* buffer, uint16_t bufferSize, float position, CRGB color, uint8_t brightness)
functions.formula: frac = position - floor(position); left LED gets (1-frac)*brightness, right LED gets frac*brightness. Uses qadd8 for saturating addition.
functions.notes: Essential for smooth motion at low speeds. Distributes brightness between adjacent LEDs based on fractional position.

functions.name: SubpixelRenderer::renderLine
functions.signature: static void renderLine(CRGB* buffer, uint16_t bufferSize, float start, float end, CRGB color, uint8_t brightness)
functions.formula: Partial first LED + full LEDs in between + partial last LED. Anti-aliased endpoints. Uses qadd8 per channel.
functions.domain: Anti-aliased line rendering between fractional positions
functions.notes: Renders a filled line segment with anti-aliased endpoints.

functions.name: getSafeDeltaSeconds
functions.signature: inline float getSafeDeltaSeconds(float deltaSeconds)
functions.domain: Safe delta time clamping for physics stability
functions.notes: Prevents physics explosion on frame drops (>50ms) and ensures minimum timestep (0.1ms).

functions.name: tauToLambda
functions.signature: inline float tauToLambda(float tauSeconds)
functions.domain: Convert time constant to convergence rate
functions.notes: Simple reciprocal conversion for ExpDecay lambda parameter.

functions.name: centerPairDistance
functions.signature: constexpr uint16_t centerPairDistance(uint16_t index)
functions.domain: Distance from centre pair (0 at 79/80, increases outward)
functions.notes: Core geometry function for CENTER ORIGIN pattern. 105+ effect files use SET_CENTER_PAIR macro which relies on same geometry.

functions.name: centerPairSignedPosition
functions.signature: constexpr float centerPairSignedPosition(uint16_t index)
functions.domain: Signed position from centre pair (negative=left, positive=right)
functions.notes: Returns half-integer positions: -79.5 at LED 0, -0.5 at LED 79, +0.5 at LED 80, +79.5 at LED 159.

functions.name: KuramotoOscillatorField::wrapPi
functions.signature: static float wrapPi(float x)
functions.formula: x = fmod(x + pi, 2*pi); if x<0: x += 2*pi; return x - pi
functions.notes: Uses fmodf. Bounded -- prevents infinite loop on NaN/large values. Used extensively in Kuramoto engine.

functions.name: XorShift32::next01
functions.signature: float next01()
functions.domain: Uniform random float in [0, 1) from XorShift32 PRNG
functions.notes: Lightweight deterministic RNG for embedded use. Takes top 24 bits of XorShift32 state for uniform mantissa.

functions.name: XorShift32::approxNormal
functions.signature: float approxNormal()
functions.domain: Approximate Gaussian random (N(0,1)) from sum of uniforms
functions.notes: Central Limit Theorem approximation using 6 uniform samples. Mean 0, variance ~1. Cheap alternative to Box-Muller.

functions.name: KuramotoTransportBuffer::toneMapToCRGB8
functions.signature: static CRGB toneMapToCRGB8(const RGB16& in, float exposure, float saturationBoost)
functions.formula: r = in.r/65535 * exposure; lum = (r+g+b)/3; lumT = lum/(1+lum); scale = lumT/lum. Then Rec.709 luma-based saturation boost: luma = 0.2126r + 0.7152g + 0.0722b; ch = luma + (ch - luma)*(1+sat).
functions.domain: HDR-to-LDR luminance-preserving tone map with saturation boost
functions.notes: Luminance-based tone map preserves hue (fixes colour corruption from per-channel tone mapping). Soft-knee: lumT = lum/(1+lum). Rec.709 luma weights for saturation boost.

functions.name: BeatPulseTransportCore::kneeToneMap
functions.signature: static inline float kneeToneMap(float in01, float knee = 0.5f)
functions.formula: mapped = in01 / (in01 + knee); return mapped * (1 + knee). At knee=0.5, 1.0 maps to ~1.0.
functions.domain: Knee tone map for HDR readout (boosts lows, compresses highs)
functions.notes: Keeps low-level energy visible and prevents harsh clipping. Rescaled so peak brightness stays punchy.

functions.name: KuramotoFeatureExtractor::extract
functions.signature: static void extract(const float* theta, const float* prevTheta, uint16_t radius, const float* kernel, float* outVelocity, float* outCoherence, float* outEvent)

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: Nonlocal radius used by oscillator field

functions.formula: Coherence: r = |sum(w*exp(j*theta))| / sum_w. Velocity: wrapPi(theta[i+1]-theta[i-1]) / pi. Event: 0.8*slip + 0.6*edge + 0.5*curvature (soft threshold at 0.12).
functions.domain: Extract renderable features from invisible Kuramoto phase field
functions.notes: Expensive: 80 cells x (2*radius+1) sinf+cosf calls for coherence computation. Dominant cost in Kuramoto pipeline. Phase slips, coherence edges, curvature combined for event detection.

functions.name: fastled_sin16_normalized
functions.signature: inline float fastled_sin16_normalized(uint16_t angle)

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: Angle in FastLED units (0-65535 maps to 0-2pi)

functions.notes: FastLED sin16 is a lookup-table-based approximation -- much cheaper than sinf. Returns float for easy math.

functions.name: fastled_cos16_normalized
functions.signature: inline float fastled_cos16_normalized(uint16_t angle)

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: Angle in FastLED units (0-65535 maps to 0-2pi)

functions.notes: FastLED cos16 is a lookup-table-based approximation.

functions.name: fastled_wrap_hue_safe
functions.signature: inline uint8_t fastled_wrap_hue_safe(uint8_t hue, int16_t offset, uint8_t maxRange = 60)

parameters.name: maxRange
parameters.description: Maximum hue range from base. Default 60 (no-rainbows rule)

functions.formula: result = (hue + offset) mod 256; clamp to maxRange from base hue if needed
functions.notes: Enforces the no-rainbows rule (<60 degree hue range) by clamping hue offset within maxRange.

functions.name: fastled_center_sin16
functions.signature: inline float fastled_center_sin16(int position, int center, float halfLength, float frequency, uint16_t phase)

parameters.name: halfLength
parameters.description: Half the strip length for normalisation

functions.formula: dist = min(|pos - center|, |pos - (center+1)|) / halfLength; return sin16(dist * freq * 256 + phase) / 32768
functions.notes: Combined helper: calculates normalised centre distance then applies FastLED sin16 wave.

functions.name: EffectContext::getDistanceFromCenter
functions.signature: float getDistanceFromCenter(uint16_t index) const
functions.domain: Normalised distance from centre (0.0 at centre, 1.0 at edges)
functions.notes: Core method for CENTER ORIGIN compliance. Effects should use this instead of raw index for position-based calculations.

functions.name: EffectContext::getSignedPosition
functions.signature: float getSignedPosition(uint16_t index) const
functions.notes: Useful for effects that need to know which side of centre an LED is on.

functions.name: EffectContext::getPhase
functions.signature: float getPhase(float frequencyHz) const
functions.domain: Time-based phase for smooth animations [0.0 to 1.0]
functions.notes: Returns sawtooth phase value. Uses totalTimeMs (SPEED-scaled).

functions.name: EffectContext::getSineWave
functions.signature: float getSineWave(float frequencyHz) const
functions.notes: Uses sinf (software trig). For cheaper alternative see fastled_sin16_normalized.

constants.name: kCos
constants.domain: Precomputed cosines for 12 chroma bin positions (30-degree steps)

constants.name: kSin
constants.domain: Precomputed sines for 12 chroma bin positions (30-degree steps)

constants.name: CENTER_LEFT
constants.domain: Last LED of left half (centre pair left)

constants.name: CENTER_RIGHT
constants.domain: First LED of right half (centre pair right)

constants.name: kTempoConfMin
constants.domain: Minimum tempo confidence for audio beat gate

constants.name: CONTROLBUS_NUM_BANDS
constants.domain: Number of frequency bands in ControlBusFrame

constants.name: CONTROLBUS_NUM_CHROMA
constants.domain: Number of chroma bins (one per semitone)

constants.name: CONTROLBUS_NUM_ZONES
constants.domain: Number of AGC zones (Sensory Bridge pattern)

constants.name: BINS_64_COUNT
constants.domain: Number of 64-bin Goertzel spectrum bins (110-4186 Hz)

constants.name: BINS_256_COUNT
constants.domain: Number of 256-bin FFT magnitude bins (62.5 Hz spacing @ 32kHz/512-pt)

constants.name: KuramotoOscillatorField::N
constants.domain: Oscillator count (one per radial bin, centre-to-edge)

constants.name: KuramotoOscillatorField::MAX_R
constants.domain: Maximum nonlocal coupling radius for kernel

chroma_processing.description: Circular weighted mean chroma-to-hue conversion and smoothing. Replaces broken argmax pattern.

smoothing_primitives.description: Frame-rate-independent smoothing primitives: exponential decay, springs, asymmetric followers, EMA alpha computation.

rendering_helpers.description: Colour manipulation, tone mapping, blend modes, brightness scaling, subpixel rendering, film post-processing.

audio_feature_access.description: Delta time policies separating audio-coupled (raw) from visual-only (SPEED-scaled) timing.

noise.description: Deterministic RNG, approximate Gaussian, Kuramoto feature extraction, FastLED sin16/cos16 wrappers.

geometry.description: Centre-origin geometry, ring profiles, distance calculations, phase/sine wave generation.

beat_processing.description: Beat envelope, ring position, intensity computation, beat tick detection with confidence gating and fallback metronome.

audio_features.description: Smoothed RMS energy level (overall loudness)
Fast-response RMS (quicker attack for transient detection)
Spectral flux / novelty proxy (onset detection signal)
Fast-response spectral flux
8 frequency bands (bass to treble: 60Hz, 120Hz, 250Hz, 500Hz, 1kHz, 2kHz, 4kHz, 7.8kHz)
Extra-smoothed 8 frequency bands (slower attack/release for LGP viewing)
12-bin chromagram (one per semitone, C=0 through B=11)
Extra-smoothed 12-bin chromagram
Time-domain waveform samples (Sensory Bridge NATIVE_RESOLUTION)
64-bin Goertzel spectrum (110Hz - 4186Hz, normalised magnitudes)
64-bin adaptive normalised spectrum (Sensory Bridge max follower)
Full 256-bin FFT magnitude spectrum (62.5Hz spacing @ 32kHz/512-pt)
Chord detection results (root note, type: NONE/MAJOR/MINOR/DIMINISHED/AUGMENTED, confidence)
Musical saliency metrics (harmonic, rhythmic, timbral, dynamic novelty + overall)

audio_features.range: UNKNOWN, RHYTHMIC_DRIVEN, HARMONIC_DRIVEN, MELODIC_DRIVEN, TEXTURE_DRIVEN, DYNAMIC_DRIVEN
audio_features.description: Detected music style classification
Percussive element energy (snare 150-300Hz, hi-hat 6-12kHz)
Single-frame onset pulse for snare and hi-hat detection
Audio-driven liveliness scalar for global speed trim
Silence detection scale (1.0=active, fades to 0.0 after configurable silence hysteresis)
ES v1.1_320 tempo tracking extras (BPM, beat tick, strength, phase)
Sensory Bridge parity side-car pipeline fields (spectrogram, chroma, hue)

third_party_functions.name: atan2f
third_party_functions.notes: Primarily used in ChromaUtils circular mean. ~60 cycles.

third_party_functions.name: sqrtf
third_party_functions.notes: Used for distance, Gaussian, coherence calculations.

third_party_functions.name: expf
third_party_functions.notes: Used in EMA alpha computation, Gaussian profiles. ~60 cycles.

third_party_functions.name: nscale8
third_party_functions.notes: FastLED 8-bit channel scaling. Single multiply + shift.

third_party_functions.name: scale8
third_party_functions.notes: FastLED 8-bit multiply-then-shift. More efficient than float multiplication.

third_party_functions.name: sin16 / cos16
third_party_functions.notes: FastLED table-based 16-bit trig. Returns int16_t (-32768 to 32767). Much cheaper than sinf/cosf.

third_party_functions.name: beatsin8 / beatsin16
third_party_functions.notes: Time-based oscillating values at BPM rate.

third_party_functions.name: ColorFromPalette
third_party_functions.notes: Palette lookup with interpolation. Core rendering function.

third_party_functions.name: fadeToBlackBy
third_party_functions.notes: Per-LED brightness reduction for trail effects.

gaps.description: LGPFilmPost.cpp static functions (hash32, buildGammaLUT) are file-static and not fully documented as they are internal implementation details of the cinema post chain.
MusicalSaliency.h and StyleDetector.h (included by ControlBus.h) were not read. MusicalSaliencyFrame and MusicStyle types are documented via ControlBusFrame fields only.
AudioTime.h and MusicalGrid.h were not read. MusicalGridSnapshot and AudioTime types are documented via AudioContext accessors only.
BehaviorSelection.h was not read. BehaviorContext and VisualBehavior types are documented via AudioContext accessor signatures only.
used_by_effects_count values for audio_features are estimates based on grep patterns rather than exact per-field counts.
The manifest's full symbol_index and class_index were not readable due to file size. Function discovery was done via grep of source files.

Perlin backend effects (LGPPerlinBackendEmotiscopeFullEffect, LGPPerlinBackendEmotiscopeQuarterEffect, LGPPerlinBackendFastLEDEffect) contain inline Perlin noise implementations that were not fully parsed.
LGPExperimentalAudioPack.cpp (41KB) and LGPHolyShitBangersPack.cpp (20KB) contain multiple inline helper functions that were not individually catalogued due to being pack-internal.
